UNAUTH_NO_USER: No user found, please re-select account
NETWORK: Network error, please check your connection
STREAM_IN_PROGRESS: This conversation already has a message generating
LLM_PROVIDER_ERROR: LLM provider returned an error, please try again
LLM_AUTH_FAILED: API Key is invalid or expired, please update it in settings
LLM_RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests, please wait and try again
LLM_BAD_REQUEST: Request format error, please check settings
LLM_MODEL_NOT_FOUND: Model ID does not exist at provider, please check settings
MODEL_NOT_CONFIGURED: Model not configured, please set one up in settings
API_KEY_PROVIDER_NOT_FOUND: No active API Key for this provider
